data.title: Buy Rating on Boston Scientific’s Watchman FLX Backed by Champion Trial Success and Accelerating LAAC Market Growth
data.description:
Analyst Josh Jennings from TD Cowen maintained a Buy rating on Boston Scientific and keeping the price target at $100.00.

End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Josh Jennings has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors tied to the strong Champion trial results for Boston Scientific’s Watchman FLX device. The study demonstrated meaningfully lower rates of non‑procedural bleeding versus NOACs while maintaining comparable protection against stroke, cardiovascular or unexplained death, and systemic embolism, reinforcing the clinical appeal and safety profile of Watchman.

These outcomes, including achievement of all primary and secondary endpoints and clear evidence of net clinical benefit over NOAC therapy, validate management’s assumption of roughly 20% annual expansion in the left atrial appendage closure market. With this clinical validation now publicly presented at ACC and published in NEJM, Jennings sees enhanced physician confidence, durable demand, and a stronger long‑term growth trajectory supporting a Buy rating on BSX shares.

In another report released on March 26, Goldman Sachs also maintained a Buy rating on the stock with a $93.00 price target.
data.author: TipRanks Auto-Generated Intelligence Newsdesk
